Escape Heat
AI-Powered Urban Heat Decision Intelligence Platform
Project Overview

Escape Heat is a decision intelligence platform that helps citizens, organizations, and city authorities understand urban heat conditions and make safer daily decisions using real-time environmental data and Generative AI.

Unlike traditional weather applications, Escape Heat focuses on analyzing current conditions and generating actionable recommendations, rather than predicting future weather.

Problem Statement

Current weather applications display environmental metrics but do not explain:

Personal heat risk
Health impact
Recommended actions
Community heat exposure
Urban intervention priorities

Environmental data exists but remains fragmented and difficult for the public to interpret.

Solution

Escape Heat integrates weather, environmental, and geospatial data into a centralized Heat Intelligence Engine that generates personalized insights and AI-powered recommendations.

Decision Pipeline

Collect Data
      ↓
Analyze Conditions
      ↓
Calculate Risk
      ↓
Generate Insights
      ↓
Recommend Actions
Target Users
Citizens
Outdoor workers
Elderly & vulnerable individuals
Organizations
Municipal authorities
Tech Stack
Layer	Technology
Frontend	Next.js + React
UI	Tailwind CSS
Backend	FastAPI
Database	Supabase PostgreSQL
Authentication	Supabase Auth
Storage	Supabase Storage
AI	Gemini API
AI Agent	Google ADK
Maps	Leaflet + OpenStreetMap
Charts	Chart.js
Deployment	Vercel + Render
Version Control	GitHub
Data Sources
Weather
Open-Meteo API
NASA POWER
IMD Open Datasets (optional)
Satellite
ISRO Datasets
Land Surface Temperature Data
Environment
OpenStreetMap
Tree Cover Data
Land Use / Land Cover Data
System Architecture
User
 │
 ▼
Location + User Profile
 │
 ├── Weather APIs
 ├── Satellite Data
 └── Environmental Data
          │
          ▼
    FastAPI Backend
          │
          ▼
 Heat Intelligence Engine
          │
          ▼
 Gemini AI + ADK
          │
          ▼
 Dashboard & Recommendations
MVP Features
1. Heat Dashboard
Current Location
Heat Risk
Temperature
Feels Like
Humidity
UV Index
Wind Speed
Air Quality
Daily Risk Summary
2. Interactive Heat Map
Current Location
Heat Zones
Parks
Hospitals
Cooling Centers (Demo)
Water Stations (Demo)
3. Escape AI Assistant

Natural language assistant powered by environmental context.

Example:

Is it safe to go jogging?

Uses:

Weather
User Profile
Environmental Data
Heat Risk
4. Recommendation Engine

Provides:

Hydration Advice
Outdoor Activity Guidance
Clothing Suggestions
Safe Time Recommendations
Travel Advice
Health Precautions
MVP Workflow
Weather APIs
Satellite Data
Environmental Data

        │
        ▼
   FastAPI Backend
        │
        ▼

        │
        ▼

        ▼
Dashboard + Recommendations
Deliverables
Responsive Web Application
Heat Dashboard
Interactive Heat Map
AI Assistant
Recommendation Engine
Backend APIs
Supabase Database
Production Deployment
Project Principles
Analyze current conditions; do not predict future weather.
AI explains insights using structured environmental data.
Risk scores are generated by the Heat Intelligence Engine.
Recommendations must be personalized and explainable.
Use real public datasets wherever possible.
Design modules to be independent, reusable, and API-driven.
